RPD 28: EVEN IF THE ADJUSTERS WHO HANDLED THIS CLAIM WERE ATTORNEYS, THEY MAY HAVE RECEIVED SOME TRAINING, AND THE MATERIALS SOUGHT COULD LEAD TO THE DISCOVERY OF ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE ON THE SUBJECT OF CENTURY'S STANDARDS FOR CLAIM HANDLING. CENTURY IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS, IF ANY EXIST. RPD 30: CENTURY SAYS IT HAS PROVIDED ALL RESPONSIVE WRITINGS. THE MAYER DECL., 8, SUGGESTS THAT THERE MAY BE ADDITIONAL TRAINING MATERIALS USED IN PRESENTATIONS, EVEN IF WRITTEN MATERIALS ARE NOT DISTRIBUTED. TO THE EXTENT ANY ADDITIONAL TRAINING MATERIALS USED IN CALIFORNIA TRAINING SESSIONS EXIST, THEY SHOULD BE PRODUCED. RPD 45: PARTIES REACHED AN AGREEMENT DURING THE HEARING RPD 46: THE MATERIALS SOUGHT COULD LEAD TO THE DISCOVERY OF ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE ON THE SUBJECT OF HOW CENTURY CONSTRUED ITS POLICY LANGUAGE. IF RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS EXIST, THEY SHOULD BE PRODUCED WITHIN 10 DAYS. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: LCN.

THE MAYER DECL., 8, SUGGESTS THAT THERE MAY BE ADDITIONAL TRAINING MATERIALS USED IN PRESENTATIONS, EVEN IF WRITTEN MATERIALS ARE NOT DISTRIBUTED. TO THE EXTENT ANY ADDITIONAL TRAINING MATERIALS USED IN CALIFORNIA TRAINING SESSIONS EXIST, THEY SHOULD BE PRODUCED. RPD 17: CENTURY SAYS IT HAS PROVIDED ALL RESPONSIVE WRITINGS. TO THE EXTENT ANY ADDITIONAL MATERIALS SHOWING CHANGES IN CLAIMS HANDLING GUIDELINES IN CALIFORNIA EXIST, THEY SHOULD BE PRODUCED. CENTURY IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS LIMITED TO PERIOD 2008-2011, IF ANY EXIST. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185 (302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES - ATTY. JOSEPH S. MAY, TEL. NO. 781-3333 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFFS;
ATTY. H. DOUGLAS GALT OF THE WOOLLS PEE LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. (213)629-1600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT CENTURY SURETY COMPANY BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D. PLAINTIFFS SHAWN CHOY and KAYLA CHA's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanction - The Court finds as follows regarding Plaintiff's RPD Set 1:
RPD 16: Century says it has provided all responsive writings. The Mayer Decl., 8, suggests that there may be additional training materials used in presentations, even if written materials are not distributed. To the extent any additional training materials used in California training sessions exist, they should be produced.
RPD 17: Century says it has provided all responsive writings. To the extent any additional materials showing changes in claims handling guidelines in California exist, they should be produced.
RPD 18: Even if the adjusters who handled this claim were attorneys, the materials sought could lead to the discovery of admissible evidence on the subject of Century's standards for claim handling. Century is ordered to produce responsive documents, if any exist.
RPD 19: Even if the adjusters who handled this claim were attorneys, the materials sought could lead to the discovery of admissible evidence on the subject of Century's pattern of compliance with insurance regulations. Century is ordered to produce responsive documents limited to period 2008-2011, if any exist.
RPD 20: Even if the adjusters who handled this claim were attorneys, the materials sought could lead to the discovery of admissible evidence on the subject of Century's pattern of compliance with insurance regulations. Century is ordered to produce responsive documents limited to period 2008-2011, if any exist.
RPD 21: The materials sought could lead to the discovery of admissible evidence on the subject of Century's pattern of compliance with insurance regulations. Century is ordered to produce responsive documents limited to period 2008-2011, if any exist.
RPD 22: The materials sought could lead to the discovery of admissible evidence on the subject of Century's pattern of compliance with insurance regulations. Century is ordered to produce responsive documents limited to period 2008-2011, if any exist.
RPD 23: The materials sought could lead to the discovery of admissible evidence on the subject of Century's pattern of compliance with insurance regulations. Century is ordered to produce responsive documents limited to period 2008-2011, if any exist.
RPD 24: The materials sought could lead to the discovery of admissible evidence on the subject of Century's pattern of compliance with insurance regulations. Century is ordered to produce responsive documents limited to period 2008-2011, if any exist.
RPD 28: Even if the adjusters who handled this claim were attorneys, they may have received some training, and the materials sought could lead to the discovery of admissible evidence on the subject of Century's standards for claim handling. Century is ordered to produce responsive documents, if any exist.
RPD 30: Century says it has provided all responsive writings. The Mayer Decl., 8, suggests that there may be additional training materials used in presentations, even if written materials are not distributed. To the extent any additional training materials used in California training sessions exist, they should be produced.
RPD 45: Parties reached an agreement during the hearing
RPD 46: The materials sought could lead to the discovery of admissible evidence on the subject of how Century construed its policy language. If responsive documents exist, they should be produced within 10 days. Request for sanctions is denied. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.
